testcase.name: verifyProductDetailsInCart

failure.message: The following asserts failed: Brand mismatch expected [4.2 | 99 AD MuscleBlaze Men T-shirt Rs. 799Rs. 999(20% OFF)] but found [Brand]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: Brand mismatch expected [4.2 | 99 AD MuscleBlaze Men T-shirt Rs. 799Rs. 999(20% OFF)] but found [Brand] at com.skillo.tests.CartPageTest.verifyProductDetailsInCart(CartPageTest.java:75) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 27 stack frames
